translated: I've picked out some scenes I personally want to talk about again,
so let's jump right in.
The one I chose is from Episode 8.
Here it is.
Can Nakashima-san play the guitar as well as the bass?
I can't.
I've given up on doing both the solo concert and the fan festa. I think I've looked into every possible option.
In my own way...
I understand how both audiences feel now.
But Honami-chan's struggle as a leader... how should I put it? Not knowing which is better yet,
and not having an answer within herself.
That part is really good, isn't it?
I was the one who said I wanted to show everyone the way.
Ichika-chan told me not to take it all on myself, and this is something for everyone to decide, but if I stay indecisive, I might just end up confusing them.
That's why...
I have to make up my mind.
It's great that she feels she needs to decide for herself here.
But I also don't want it to become too much of a burden for her.
Just watch.
I'm sure the fans will love the new song for the solo concert.
And I'm sure Saki-chan and Shiho-chan want to do that one too.
But...
Man, I really love this song.
Episode 7 was great too.
It makes you feel like you're not alone.
I want people who love Virtual Singers to hear our music too.
Is it unavoidable? A phone call?
I'm sure Ichika-chan feels the same way.
It's kind of painful to watch, isn't it?
If I have to choose one...
The one I choose is...
Is that Shindo-san?
Hello? Good work today.
Good work.
I'm sorry for calling so late.
There's something I need to report to you right away.
The timing is so good, it's like, "Whoa!"
Yes?
Actually...
The request for the fan festa commission has been withdrawn.
Wait, what?
Oh, please don't worry.
It wasn't due to any fault on our end.
I just heard from the person in charge.
It seems the creator who was ill reached out.
Oh...
You mean the one who was originally supposed to do the commission?
Yes.
It looks like they'll be able to finish all three songs on schedule after all.
The other party was incredibly apologetic.
They sounded like they were about to prostrate themselves through the phone.
I see. So that's what happened.
But I'm glad they're feeling better.
Even if it's a bit disappointing that the offer fell through.
Indeed.
Actually, we received a new request.
A new request?
The person in charge said they'd love to commission Leo/need for the "Fresh Talent" slot at the next fan festa.
Partly as an apology for this time.
I see.
It's a bit further out, but I think we should consider it positively.
Since it's in the future, there shouldn't be any scheduling issues.
I understand.
I'll discuss the matter with everyone again.
Please do.
It's not urgent, so feel free to take your time deciding.
But I'm truly sorry for causing so much trouble and shaking things up.
This feels so realistic.
No, not at all.
Besides, I'm glad we found out before we officially accepted.
Yeah.
Hearing you say that is a relief.
From now on, I'll give you my full support so you can focus on the solo concert and the new song.
Thank you very much.
What a relief.
Right now, I...
Well then, I'll leave contacting the other members to you.
I'll contact the solo concert staff and tell them we're moving forward with the setlist including the new song.
Ah.
